title: What Should I Read Next?
description: Anne Bogel — the blogger behind Modern Mrs. Darcy — talks books with readers, helping them find their next great read by dissecting what they love and what leaves them cold.

title: The Book Review
description: The New York Times Book Review podcast features author interviews, discussions of the week's notable new books, and conversations about literature and the publishing world.

title: The New Yorker Fiction Podcast
description: A prominent author reads and discusses a classic story from the New Yorker archive.

title: Book Riot Podcast
description: Book news, recommendations, and the reading life — for the obsessed reader.

title: Backlisted
description: Rediscovering overlooked, forgotten, and underrated books with infectious enthusiasm.

title: 3 Books With Neil Pasricha
description: 3 Books is a completely insane and totally epic 22-year-long quest to uncover and discuss the 1000 most formative books in the world.

title: Alzabo Soup
description: Deep chapter-by-chapter analysis of speculative fiction — we literally become our favorite authors by devouring portions of their brains.

title: Bookaholic
description: A safe place for reading junkies who obsess over books, authors, bookstores, book news, and trivia — with author interviews, genre deep-dives, and bookish things.

title: Books, Beach & Beyond
description: The 'Queen of Beach Reads' Elin Hilderbrand and Tim Talks Books host spirited conversations with bestselling authors about the writing process, the road to screen, and the stories behind the stories.

title: Concavity Show
description: A podcast about literary fiction and the world of books.

title: Hardcore Literature
description: Deep dives into the greatest books ever written — Shakespeare, Homer, Tolstoy, and beyond. We don't just read the great books, we live them.

title: Literary Quest
description: A podcast dedicated to fantasy fiction — weekly discussions and recommendations for genre lovers.

title: London Review Bookshop Podcast
description: Literary events recorded at the London Review Bookshop — fiction, poetry, politics, music, and much more.

title: The Music Book Podcast
description: Talking to authors about how they wrote their books about music. Hosted by music writer Marc Masters.

title: The Book Case
host: ABC News | Charlie Gibson, Kate Gibson
description: The Book Case makes the case for books outside of your usual genre. Wander the aisles of your local bookstore with Kate and Charlie Gibson and meet authors who will open your appetite to new categories.

title: The H.P. Lovecraft Literary Podcast
description: Hosts Chad Fifer and Chris Lackey discuss genre fiction weekly, with voice actors, sound design, and occasional expert guests.

title: The Lost Sci-Fi Podcast
description: Restores and narrates forgotten vintage science fiction short stories from the 1700s through the mid-1960s — #1 on Apple Podcasts in 43 countries.

title: The Paris Review
description: The best interviews, fiction, essays, and poetry from America's most legendary literary quarterly, brought to life in sound.

title: Book News
description: We review all kinds of books and talk about them.

title: Fully Booked by Kirkus Reviews
description: Get the ultimate insider's scoop on the best new books. The editors at Kirkus Reviews interview your favorite authors, tell you whether or not the books on the bestseller list are worth the read.

title: Read This
description: A show about the books we love and the stories behind them — in-depth interviews with the best Australian and international authors.

title: Reading And Writing Podcast
description: Interviews with authors about their books, writing habits, favorite novels, and how they got started writing.
